responsibilities: Develop UVM-based testbenches and verification environments to validate functional correctness of complex digital and SoC designs.
Write verification test plans defining coverage goals, test scenarios, and verification strategy for new RTL features.
Implement constrained-random stimulus generation and functional coverage models to maximize verification thoroughness and bug detection.
Develop SystemVerilog assertions (SVA) to check protocol compliance and catch design errors early in simulation.
Debug simulation failures by analyzing waveforms, log files, and RTL behavior using Synopsys Verdi or similar tools.
Collaborate with RTL design engineers to triage bugs, reproduce failures, and verify fixes through regression testing.
Run and maintain regression suites, analyzing coverage reports to identify verification gaps and close coverage holes.
Apply formal verification techniques to prove design properties and identify corner-case bugs missed by simulation-based testing.
Participate in verification sign-off reviews, ensuring all coverage and quality metrics are met before tapeout.
Automate testbench infrastructure and regression flows using Python or Perl scripting to improve verification efficiency.
